Behold, We revealed this (Qur'an) on the Night of Power.Footnote-1
And what do you know what the Night of Power is?
The Night of Power is better than a thousand months.Footnote-2
The angels along with the SpiritFootnote-3 descend in it by the permission of their LordFootnote-4 with all kinds of decrees.
All peace is that night until the rise of dawn.Footnote-5
